headline: Glasgow’s on-demand emergency plumbers in 45 minutes or less
subheadline: Fleet-ready storm service and guaranteed home security checks after every job.
about_text: Everflow Plumbing supports Glasgow households with smart leak sensors and rapid access code service.

services.title: Storm Damage Plumbing
services.description: 24/7 storm-team deployments for flooded roadsides and building leaks.

services.title: Advanced Diagnostics
services.description: Thermal scan, pressure and camera inspections for hidden pipework issues.

services.title: Priority Landlord Support
services.description: Guaranteed work windows and compliance documentation for rental portfolios.

reviews.name: Fiona G.
reviews.quote: Rated 5 stars for speed and clean professional finish.

reviews.name: Liam S.
reviews.quote: Great communication and no nonsense quote for urgent repairs.

faqs.question: Can I pay via card on site?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept all cards and contactless payments plus bank transfer.

faqs.question: Do you service heritage properties?
faqs.answer: We have specialist teams for older Glasgow buildings and council flats.

service_area_text: Glasgow CBD, West End, Southside, East End, and surrounding valleys.

metadata.title: Everflow Plumbing | Glasgow Emergency Plumbers
metadata.description: Everflow offers Glasgow emergency plumbing with proof-driven reliability and rapid dispatch.
